fields.name: Plywood
fields.description: Premium quality plywood for all construction and furniture needs

fields.name: Sunmica & Laminates
fields.description: High-gloss and matte laminates in hundreds of designs

fields.name: Hardware Items
fields.description: Hinges, handles, screws, and all hardware accessories

fields.name: BWR Plywood 19mm
fields.description: Boiling Water Resistant plywood, ideal for kitchens and bathrooms. Superior bonding with phenolic resin. Suitable for furniture, cabinets, and flooring.

fields.name: Commercial Plywood 12mm
fields.description: High-quality commercial grade plywood for general purpose use. Perfect for interior furniture, partitions, and wall paneling.

fields.name: Marine Plywood 18mm
fields.description: Waterproof marine-grade plywood. Excellent for outdoor furniture, boat building, and areas with high moisture exposure.

fields.name: Sunmica Laminate - Walnut Finish
fields.description: Premium walnut wood grain laminate. Provides realistic wood texture with durability. Scratch and heat resistant surface.

fields.name: High Gloss White Laminate
fields.description: Ultra-high gloss white laminate for modern kitchen and wardrobe fronts. Easy to clean, fingerprint resistant.

fields.name: Fevicol SH - 5kg
fields.description: India's most trusted wood adhesive. Provides strong, durable bond for plywood, laminates, and wood joints. Water-resistant formula.

fields.name: Contact Cement Adhesive
fields.description: High-strength contact adhesive for bonding laminates to substrates. Fast drying, solvent-based for professional use.

fields.name: Concealed Hinges Set
fields.description: Heavy-duty concealed cabinet hinges with soft-close mechanism. Adjustable 3-way for perfect alignment. Pack of 10 pairs.

fields.name: Drawer Channel Slides 18 inch
fields.description: Premium ball-bearing drawer slides with full extension. Smooth operation, 40kg load capacity. Suitable for all kitchen and furniture drawers.
